product.description: Product identifier for the task_run activity-log entry (lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, hyphens). Defaults to 'tasks'.

task_id.description: Task to associate with the report (must belong to this project). Omit to associate the calling agent's own task, derived from the X-PostHog-Task-Id header.

type.description: Task type within the product for the task_run activity-log entry (same format). Defaults to 'agent_run'.
